Why we built PSA We built PSA because we wanted to operationalize the Cybersecurity Psychology Framework (CPF3)[1]…
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Researchers developed Posture Sequence Analysis (PSA), a behavioral health monitor for LLMs and AI agents.  
• Why it matters: PSA aims to enhance the operationalization of the Cybersecurity Psychology Framework, improving AI safety and performance.  
• Business opportunity: There is potential for companies to integrate PSA into their AI systems to ensure better compliance and risk management.

topNews.title: Colossal Biosciences is growing chickens in a 3D-printed artificial eggshell

But not from an egg.  Instead, these chickens were growing inside transparent 3D-printed plastic cups at the Dallas headquarters of Colossal Biosciences. The biotech company today claimed it has developed a “fully artificial …
topNews.summary:
• What happened: Colossal Biosciences has successfully grown chickens in 3D-printed artificial eggshells.  
• Why it matters: This innovation could revolutionize poultry production and animal welfare by reducing reliance on natural eggs.  
• Business opportunity: There is potential for new markets in sustainable agriculture and biotechnology solutions for food production.

funding.title: The OpenAI trial wraps up, and the Musk founder machine keeps spinning
funding.rawTextSnippet: The Musk v. Altman trial came to a close this week, and the final arguments kept circling back to one question: can we trust the people in charge of AI? All of this is playing out as SpaceX charges toward what could be one of the largest IPOs in American history, with a whole generati…

dailyBrief: Anthropic has made headlines with its acquisition of Stainless, a move that signals its aggressive expansion as it prepares for an IPO, raising concerns about potential market volatility. As companies increasingly rely on AI engineers to optimize operations, there's a growing trend of professionals moving away from traditional coding roles, which could reshape workforce dynamics in tech. Additionally, a new tool showcased on Hacker News aims to analyze outputs from large language models (LLMs), highlighting the importance of behavioral health monitoring in AI applications. Meanwhile, the U.S. Cybersecurity Agency's decision to leave sensitive digital keys publicly accessible on GitHub underscores significant risks in cybersecurity practices, potentially jeopardizing national security and prompting businesses to reassess their own data protection strategies.
